data.title: EXCLUSIVE: La Rosa 9M Revenue Surges 120%, Eyes Profitability by 2025
data.description: La Rosa Holdings Corp (NASDAQ:LRHC) expects $45 million revenue in first 9 months of 2024, a 120% increase from 2023. Aims for $100 million in 2024 and profitability in 2025.

data.title: Coca-Cola Q3 Earnings: EPS Beat, Pricing Growth Offset By Volume Decline, Sees 10% Q4 Organic Revenue Growth
data.description: Coca-Cola's Q3 2024 revenue declined 1% to $11.9 billion with a 10% price/mix growth. Adjusted EPS reached $0.77, and 2024 organic revenue growth is forecast at 10%.

data.title: This McDonald's Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Wednesday
Trump Wins Or Harris, Blackstone's CEO Says US Will Dodge Recession As Americans Cite Economy As A Top Election Issue
data.description: During an interview in Tokyo, Steve Schwarzman expressed confidence that the U.S. economy will sidestep a recession.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From IBM Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: IBM (NYSE: IBM) to release Q3 earnings on Oct. 23. Showcasing AI advancement and offering 2.88% dividend yield. Invest $208,561 for $500 monthly, or $41,805 for $100.
